title: ApprovalBoundIdentity
description: Typed bound-identity detail for approval request/decision and immutable binding hashes.

approval_decision_digest.description: Canonical signed approval-decision digest identity when resolved.

policy_decision_hash.description: Compiled policy decision hash linked to this approval.

manifest_hash.description: Compiled effective policy-context manifest hash bound to this approval.

relevant_artifact_hashes.description: Exact relevant artifact digests bound in the approval request context.

bound_action_hash.description: Canonical ActionRequest hash when binding_kind is exact_action.

bound_stage_summary_hash.description: Canonical stage summary hash when binding_kind is stage_sign_off.

decision_approver.description: Approver principal identity from signed decision payload when available.

decision_verifier_key_id.description: Verifier key-id selected by the signed decision envelope.

decision_verifier_key_id_value.description: Verifier key-id value selected by the signed decision envelope.

scope_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for the scope evidence shown to the approver.

artifact_set_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for artifact-set evidence shown to the approver.

diff_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for diff evidence shown to the approver when available.

summary_preview_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for summary or preview evidence shown to the approver when available.

consumed_action_hash.description: Bound action hash for the final action that consumed this approval when applicable.

consumed_artifact_digest.description: Artifact digest for the final artifact path that consumed this approval when applicable.

consumption_link_digest.description: Canonical digest linking approval identity with the final consuming action evidence when available.
